structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling Zone State - Primary Airflow Setpoint Mapping
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: When the Zone State Is Cooling
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In cooling mode, the cooling loop output is mapped to the active primary airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active primary airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint and the series fan airflow setpoint shall be no higher than OA-min.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Map cooling loop output to active primary airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint. If AHU SAT > room temperature, set primary airflow setpoint ≤ minimum endpoint and series fan airflow setpoint ≤ OA-min.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. The cooling-loop output shall be mapped to the active primary airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. 1. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active primary airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint and the series fan airflow setpoint shall be no higher than OA-min.

evidence_quote: a. The cooling-loop output shall be mapped to the active primary airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. 1. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active primary airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint and the series fan airflow setpoint shall be no higher than OA-min.
evidence_text: a. The cooling-loop output shall be mapped to the active primary airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. 1. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active primary airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint and the series fan airflow setpoint shall be no higher than OA-min.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Zone State - First Stage (0-50% Heating Loop)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: From 0% to 50% heating loop output, reset the discharge temperature setpoint from the current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint. Primary airflow setpoint is minimum endpoint, series fan airflow setpoint is OA-min.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Heating and Heating Loop output is between 0% and 50%
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Reset discharge temperature setpoint from current AHU SAT setpoint to max of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint. Primary airflow setpoint = minimum endpoint. Series fan airflow setpoint = OA-min.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. From 0% to 50%, the Heating Loop output shall reset the discharge temperature setpoint from the current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint. The primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint, and the series fan airflow setpoint shall be OA-min.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Zone State - Second Stage (50-100% Heating Loop)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: From 50% to 100% heating loop output, reset the series fan airflow setpoint from OA-min to Sfan-htgmax. Primary airflow setpoint remains minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Heating and Heating Loop output is between 50% and 100%
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Reset series fan airflow setpoint from OA-min to Sfan-htgmax. Active primary airflow setpoint = minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: b. From 50% to 100%, the Heating Loop output shall reset the series fan airflow setpoint from OA-min to a Sfan-htgmax. The active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The heating coil is modulated to maintain the discharge temperature at setpoint. Directly controlling heating off zone temperature control loop is not acceptable.

structured_payload_candidate.summary: The VAV damper is modulated to maintain the measured airflow at setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Modulate VAV damper to maintain measured airflow at setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 5.10.5.4. The VAV damper shall be modulated to maintain the measured airflow at setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Fan Control - Run Conditions and Start Sequence
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fan runs whenever zone is in heating or cooling Zone State, or if the associated Zone Group is in Occupied Mode. Prior to starting the fan, the damper is driven fully closed to prevent backward rotation. After a fixed time delay (15 seconds) with fan proven ON, the damper override is released.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Heating or Cooling, or Zone Group is in Occupied Mode
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Run fan. Before starting, drive damper fully closed. After fan proven ON for 15 seconds, release damper override.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 5.10.5.5. Fan Control. Fan shall run whenever zone is in heating or cooling Zone State, or if the associated Zone Group is in Occupied Mode. Prior to starting the fan, the damper is first driven fully closed to ensure that the fan is not rotating backward. Once the fan is proven ON for a fixed time delay (15 seconds), the damper override is released.

evidence_quote: 5.10.5.5. Fan Control. Fan shall run whenever zone is in heating or cooling Zone State, or if the associated Zone Group is in Occupied Mode. Prior to starting the fan, the damper is first driven fully closed to ensure that the fan is not rotating backward. Once the fan is proven ON for a fixed time delay (15 seconds), the damper override is released.
evidence_text: 5.10.5.5. Fan Control. Fan shall run whenever zone is in heating or cooling Zone State, or if the associated Zone Group is in Occupied Mode. Prior to starting the fan, the damper is first driven fully closed to ensure that the fan is not rotating backward. Once the fan is proven ON for a fixed time delay (15 seconds), the damper override is released.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Logic Presumption - Plenum Temperature
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In heating, the logic leads with supply air temperature increase rather than fan speed increase, presuming plenum air may be neutral or below space temperature. If designer is confident plenum is always warmer, logic can be reversed.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: In the heating Zone State, the logic keeps the fan airflow rate low while supply air temperature is increased as the first heating stage. This presumes that the temperature of the air the fan is supplying is neutral or below the space temperature, as it would be if the fan draws air directly from the space, and as it might be if the fan draws air from a return air plenum that is cooled by roof and wall heat losses. ... If the designer is confident that the plenum will always be warmer, the logic can be reversed.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Standard 90.1 Overhead Supply Air Temperature Limit
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: ASHRAE/IES Standard 90.1-2016 limits overhead supply air to 11°C (20°F) above space temperature to minimize stratification.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: ASHRAE/IES Standard 90.1-2016 limits overhead supply air to 11°C (20°F) above space temperature (e.g., 32°C [90°F] at 21°C [70°F] space temperature setpoint) to minimize stratification.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Hot-Water Plant Start/Stop Logic
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Typically, the heating hot-water plant will start when there is at least one request for 5 minutes, and stop when there are no requests for 5 minutes, after a minimum run-time has elapsed.
